---
title: "Resources"
toc: false
---

This page collects practical resources for AD-Genomics-Cardiff. Replace the
placeholders with confirmed links and descriptions as materials are ready.

## Code and repositories

- **Team GitHub organisation or repository:** Placeholder link and description
- **Analysis workflows:** Placeholder link to reproducible pipelines or workflow documentation
- **Methods notebooks:** Placeholder link to public examples, tutorials, or supporting code

---

## Data and reference resources

- **Datasets:** Placeholder links to public datasets, accession pages, or data access information
- **Reference materials:** Placeholder links to annotation resources, reference genomes, or curated lists
- **Documentation:** Placeholder link to protocols, standards, or data dictionaries

---

## Methods and analysis themes

- **GWAS:** Placeholder note on summary statistics, analysis plans, or methods references
- **Polygenic risk:** Placeholder note on scoring workflows or evaluation resources
- **Long-read sequencing:** Placeholder note on sequencing, alignment, or variant-calling resources
- **Functional analyses:** Placeholder note on pathway, enrichment, or integrative interpretation resources

***

## Bioinformatics Toolkit

::: {.callout-note}
The [UKDRI Bioinformatics Toolkit](https://prdsr.quarto.pub/ukdri-bioinformatics-toolkit/)
supports reproducible bioinformatics and onboarding across projects.

It covers:
- project structure and organisation
- version control and GitHub workflows
- reproducible analysis practices
- onboarding guidance for new team members
:::

***

## Collaboration and contact

{{< include ../_partials/links.qmd >}}

- **General enquiries:** `team-contact@example.org`
- **Collaborations:** Placeholder note for prospective collaborators, students, or trainees
- **Internal resources:** Placeholder link or note for shared documentation if later needed
